visual_mood: Solid red fill with headline cut out as transparent text -- a beach scene visible through the letter cutouts, sunglasses resting on the solid area

product.placement: Resting on the solid red area below the knockout text, real surface, real shadow
product.instruction: Only ONE pair matching the reference. Real glossy sunglasses. The solid red area is the surface the product sits on.

prompt: A minimal knockout typography design. Solid Dubery red (#E31E24) fills the entire canvas. Large bold italic knockout text 'OWN IT.' in the center -- the letters are cut out to reveal a vivid Philippine beach scene through the letterforms. ONE pair of Bandits Green sunglasses from DuberyMNL rests on the solid red area below the text -- real glossy sunglasses matching the reference image with a subtle shadow. The beach scene is only visible through the letter cutouts. All text uses the typeface from the font reference. DuberyMNL logo in white bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio, ultra-clean modern design.
